eight.split: eigh(整塊唸 ㄟ,gh 不發音)+ t

egg.split: e + gg(雙子音表前面短母音)

is.split: i + s(s 在母音後唸 z)

eat.split: e + at(ea 拆開強調母音團)

the.split: 高頻不規則(th 弱化,母音弱讀)

easy come easy go.split: eas + y + come + eas + y + go

troublesome.split: troub (tr- 子音群) + le (open) + so + me

sportsman.split: sport (sp- 子音群) + sman (sm- 子音群)

sportsmanship.split: sport (sp- 子音群) + sman (sm- 子音群) + ship (sh)

glassware.split: glas (gl- 子音群) + swa (sw- 子音群) + re (open)

improvement.split: im + pro (pr- 子音群) + ve (open) + ment
